content:
YONO
Don’t Train Your Agents, Embed Them
Automating Execution with Context

Massive investments in interface agents are not delivering ROI
Deployments fail due to hallucinated actions and code drift
Problem

Time to Market
Building actionable 
agents requires months 
of custom engineering.

Reliability
60% of enterprise 
agents fail. They lack 
product context and 
hallucinate actions.

Maintenance Drain
Drift management and 
evaluations consume 
up to 40% of 
engineering resources.

Auto-generating structured context directly from the front-end 
codebase
Engine: We ingest a GitHub repository, map the internal workﬂows, and output a 
ready-to-use data layer.

Velocity
Deploy actionable 
agents in hours, not 
months.

Grounded Execution
Provide reliable product 
context so agents can 
execute actions bound to 
the product truth.

Zero Maintenance
Auto-sync directly with 
the codebase to bypass 
the enterprise IT 
bottleneck entirely.
Solution

The enterprise market is abandoning fragile chatbots for 
high-ROI, agentic infrastructure
Yesterday (2023-25)
Fragile Experiments
Investors poured billions 
into fragile Chatbots and 
Copilots.
Reality: High churn. 
Models commoditized. 
Agents hallucinated 
without business context.
Today (2026)
Context Gap
a16z conﬁrms LLMs are 
generic reasoning 
engines that require a 
dedicated context layer.
60% GenAI projects 
abandoned due to lack of 
trust. (Gartner)
Tomorrow (2026+)
Agentic Dominance
Enterprise spending on 
autonomous agents 
surpasses chatbots by 
2027.
Agentic interfaces yield 
49% ROI. Market hits 
$753B by 2030.
Sources: Gartner (2026) • Omdia & Snowﬂake (2026) • MarketsandMarkets (2030)
Why Now?

ARR
Validation from the ﬁeld
Secured pipeline gated by SOC2 & 90-day product milestones
Traction
Level 1: Discovery
45 Active Conversations
Targeted outbound & discovery
Level 2: Validation
35 Validated Intent
Conﬁrmed pain & architecture ﬁt
Level 3: Pipeline
1 Customer, 1 Pilot
1 Signed LOI ($100K) + 2 Verbal ($150K)
SOC 2 Compliance Action Engine Release 
(SF)
Blockers

The market is split between chat wrappers and API 
orchestrators
Yono bypasses both by automating context directly from the front-end.
Category Example Limitation Yono Fix
Conversational 
Front-Ends
Sierra, 
Wonderful
High OpEx. Requires armies of 
humans to manually script 
conversation ﬂows.
Automated Setup. Structurally 
map frontend codebase to learn 
the ﬂows instantly.
Backend 
Integration Adapt
Connects via backend APIs, 
requiring lengthy integration 
cycles.
Zero-Touch. Natively parse UI 
state to bypass backend API 
bottlenecks.
Internal Build DIY Drift management takes 40%+ of 
enterprise engineering resources.
Self-Healing. Auto-syncs with 
codebase to eliminate 
maintenance drain.
Foundation: YONO — A reliable processing engine that reverse-engineers the frontend into a live state graph.
Competition

INPUT
GitHub Repository and 
optional enrichment
PROCESS
Map entities, 
relationships, 
workﬂows, and user 
stories.
TECH
●Reverse Engineering
●Gen Testing Module
●Agent Platform
OUTPUT
Actionable Agents
Reliable, Self-Healing, and 
bound to live state.
Phase 1: Immediate Revenue
Overnight Actionable Agents
Target mid-market and hyper-growth scaleups to 
capture $50K ACV. Harden the architecture and 
prove the rapid-deployment wedge.
Phase 2: Enterprise Scale
Live-Sync Release
Unlock the 'High-Velocity, High-ACV' Enterprise tier. 
Roll out on-prem modules to bypass ﬁnal security 
blockers, capturing the $150K legacy pipeline.
Product & GTM Strategy
Capturing mid-market revenue immediately while hardening 
the architecture for $100K+ enterprise deployments
